title: Xiaohongshu (XHS) note
description: Machine-read source of truth for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) image-text note, at projects/{slug}/xhs/{lang}/{slug}.note.json. The reader-facing preview is rendered from this into a sibling .md. The deterministic note gate (scripts/check-xhsnote.mjs) enforces XHS platform limits (title <= 20 chars, body 100-1000 chars, tag count) and a banned absolute-claim word scan (极限词 trigger 限流). Topic selection should reuse the SEO keyword-research entry point (a *.research.json with decision: pursue) — never invent demand. Rules grounded in docs/research/2026-06-06-xiaohongshu-note-rules.md.

keyword.description: The topic (ideally backed by a *.research.json with decision: pursue).

title.description: Note title. XHS truncates past 20 chars; the gate enforces the cap.

body.description: Note body (emoji + line breaks welcome). Gate enforces 100-1000 chars.

tags.description: Topic tags WITHOUT the leading # (the renderer adds it). 1..max_tags (default 10; XHS hard cap 30).

cover_hint.description: Optional note on the cover image (not gated).

limits.description: OPTIONAL per-note override of the gate defaults (platform rules change — keep these tunable).

banned_terms.description: OPTIONAL override of the default 极限词 (absolute-claim) blocklist the gate scans for.

diversion_terms.description: OPTIONAL override of the default 导流 (off-platform contact-info) blocklist — 微信/QQ/二维码/公众号 etc. that trigger 限流/封号. Pass [] to disable the scan.
